title: aster novi-belgii subsp. johannensis
intro: Aster novi-belgii subsp. johannensis, also known as Johann's New York aster, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Aster novi-belgii subsp. johannensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
